name: claude-crew
description: Multi-agent team system for Claude Code: PM, Architect, Designer, Developer, Tester, and DevOps roles collaborating autonomously on your projects

dependencies._note: Claude Code does not yet auto-install dependencies. This section documents requirements for humans and future tooling.

built-in-tools.description: Claude Code built-in tools required by agents

mcp-servers.description: Optional MCP servers that enable additional agent capabilities

optional.name: design-tool
optional.purpose: Designer agent: direct design tool integration (e.g., Google Stitch)
optional.fallback: Designer generates prompts for human to execute manually
